title: Qualify FI-2024 as Sole-Source Injector for EP-V8 MY2025
description: Formal qualification of FI-2024 as the only approved fuel injector for EP-V8 program across all MY2025 configurations following competitive supplier audit.

outcome.note: FI-2024 designated sole-source; alternative injectors require full re-qualification before use in EP-V8/MY2025

rollback_steps: Submit Supplier Change Request (SCR) to Purchasing
Conduct PPAP Level 3 for replacement part
Obtain sign-off from Quality and Release Engineering

title: Corrective Action - FI-2027 Tip Coking in EP-V6 Pilot
description: Identified injector tip coking in FI-2027 during EP-V6 high-cycle thermal endurance testing. Change: FI-2027 flagged for additional durability validation before production use.

outcome.note: FI-2027 may be used only after 50K-mile durability confirmation per CA-2022-441

title: Update FP-38 Pressure Rating Documentation
description: Administrative update to FP-38 spec sheet to reflect 250 bar verified operating pressure (previously listed as 275 bar in error).

outcome.note: Pressure rating corrected to 250 bar; incompatible with injectors requiring >300 bar supply pressure

title: Certify EC-501 as Sole-Approved ECU for EP-V8 MY2024
description: Following supplier consolidation, EC-501 certified as the only approved ECU for EP-V8/MY2024. All alternative ECU modules require full re-validation against EP-V8 calibration baseline before production use.

outcome.note: EC-501 is the only ECU certified for EP-V8/MY2024; replacement requires full PPAP Level 3 and calibration re-validation

rollback_steps: Obtain ECU Supplier Change Approval (SCA) from Powertrain Engineering
Conduct full ECU calibration re-baseline for replacement unit
Complete PPAP Level 3 and OBD-II compliance re-certification
Obtain sign-off from Vehicle Integration and Quality Engineering

title: Validate SC-012 Cold-Start Calibration for EP-I4 MY2025
description: SC-012 sensor cluster completed extended cold-start calibration validation for EP-I4/MY2025. Approved as calibrated baseline sensor. Any replacement sensor must match or exceed the validated calibration envelope.

outcome.note: SC-012 is the validated cold-start calibration baseline for EP-I4/MY2025; replacement sensors must complete equivalent cold-start validation

rollback_steps: Submit Sensor Change Request (SCR) to Calibration Engineering
Conduct equivalent cold-start validation (-30°C to +40°C) for replacement sensor
Obtain OBD-II and emissions compliance sign-off
